item.title: how long would it take to cross hyrule?
item.description:
calculating how long it would take to cross hyrule for no reason

using link’s pariglider, hyrule is 168 miles long and 198 miles wide! this is already pretty known, though.

but, for a proper cross-hyrule trek we need to factor in:

  • average human walking speed is 3.1mph
  • terrain multipliers. flat hyrule field is easy but death mountain and the gerudo highlands would slow you down significantly
  • sleep (8 hours a night, but where WOULD you sleep?? there’s not a town every 20 mins exactly..)
  • breaks (probably 2hrs a day for meals etc)
  • so you’ve got roughly 14 usable walking hours a day at 3.1mph = 43.4 miles a day..

north to south (168 miles) = about 3.9 days

west to east (198 miles) = about 4.6 days

and that’s WITHOUT terrain multipliers. lets add those now. death mountain alone would probably add a full day realistically, you’re not doing 3.1mph up a volcano. you’re going 1mph and crying. and the gerudo highlands are basically a mountain range so west to east is probably closer to 6-8 days if you’re routing through there. for north to south you factor in lost woods and hyrule castle (good luck with that) routing through the giant evil castle full of monsters, that’ll add what..a day? two days? assuming you survive? which honestly, you won’t? at least gerudo highlands has sunshrooms and zapshrroms.. the cold though, that’d be horrible..

item.title: confy pages
item.description: just revamped all of the confy pages + added a downloads and thanks page for no reason took a bit, but i’m proud of it oh yeah, there’s also a compiled binary on the downloads page. for all you folk who don’t feel like manually installing a .py file :)

item.title: smoke alarm
item.description:
imagine a smoke alarm that instead of beeping hacks up a lung

like you’re evacuating and it’s just violently coughing above the kitchen oven

item.title: testing newpost command
item.description:
yeah it works! this is my blog post content.

i can write whatever i want here. markdown supported:

  • lists work
  • bold text
  • italic text

subheadings too

pretty cool
